description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/sklavedaniel/scalasbtjavafxdocker and defines a single build stage. In the build stage add a build job that runs the commands git submodule init, git submodule update, and sbt packageMSI, sets the SBT_OPTS and SBT_VERSION variables, and caches the directories sbt-cache/.ivy, sbt-cache/.boot, sbt-cache/.sbtboot and target with a cache key of $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME. The job should publish the generated JAR at target/scala-2.12/beatmeter-generator.jar and the MSI at target/msiPackage/beatmeter-generator-x64.msi as artifacts.
